cases.query: JAX and Kokkos advocates disagree before M2.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires bakeoff evidence instead of choosing by preference.
cases.failure_conditions: Declares a winner without comparable metrics.

cases.query: Reviewer rejects FP32 pressure gradient, worker says it is faster.
cases.expected_behavior: Demands validation evidence and captures tolerance tradeoff.

cases.query: Two reviewers disagree on a memory patch.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserves dissent and escalates or requests evidence.
